title: Ore Is a Mixture of Rock and Minerals│礦石是岩石加礦物
description: When an ore is destroyed, it will drop the corresponding rock and minerals.│礦石被破壞時，會掉落對應的岩石和礦物。
body:
# Function│功能
- After destroying **coal ore, iron ore, copper ore, gold ore, redstone ore, emerald ore, lapis lazuli ore, or diamond ore** using a non-Silk Touch tool, in addition to the dropped mineral, an extra Cobblestone will also drop.│使用非精準採集工具破壞 **煤礦、鐵礦、銅礦、金礦、紅石礦、綠寶石礦、青金石礦 或 鑽石礦** 之後，除了掉落礦物，還會額外掉落一個圓石。
- After destroying **Deepslate Coal Ore, Deepslate Iron Ore, Deepslate Copper Ore, Deepslate Gold Ore, Deepslate Redstone Ore, Deepslate Emerald Ore, Deepslate Lapis Lazuli Ore, or Deepslate Diamond Ore** using a non-precise mining tool, in addition to the dropped minerals, one Cobbled Deepslate will also drop.│使用非精準採集工具破壞 **深板岩煤礦、深板岩鐵礦、深板岩銅礦、深板岩金礦、深板岩紅石礦、深板岩綠寶石礦、深板岩青金石礦 或 深板岩鑽石礦** 之後，除了掉落礦物，還會額外掉落一個深板岩圓石。
- After destroying **Nether Gold Ore or Nether Quartz Ore** using a non-precise mining tool, in addition to the dropped ore, an extra Netherrack will drop.│使用非精準採集工具破壞 **下界金礦 或 下界石英礦** 之後，除了掉落礦物，還會額外掉落一個下界岩。
